executive_summary: The first 30 days focus on establishing a foundational social and content presence while executing two initial sales promotions. Key priorities include warming up community channels like Reddit, deploying all necessary e-commerce pages on Shopify, and launching core email automation flows. Success will be measured by initial audience growth, email list acquisition, and revenue from the Memorial Day and Pride campaigns.

must_ship: Deploy bdsmpub.com pillar, bundle, and affiliate pages on Shopify
Finalize and film 30 TikTok scripts
Build and activate Klaviyo 5-email welcome flow and quiz capture
Prepare Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS) for affiliate outreach

channel_actions.reddit: Begin 28-day karma warmup for u/No_Register151. Post/comment 3-5x daily in relevant, non-promo subreddits.
channel_actions.tiktok: Rebrand @barronzuo to @darkfantasy.studio. Film 30 scripts. Post first 3 videos.
channel_actions.instagram: Post 2 carousels introducing the brand's new direction and aesthetic.
channel_actions.email: Go live with the on-site quiz for email capture. Test welcome flow.
channel_actions.shopify: Deploy all core landing pages. Ensure product data is accurate for upcoming promos.
channel_actions.affiliate: Finalize MSDS documentation. Compile target list of 5 reviewers.

must_ship: Launch Memorial Day Reset bundle promo (20% off)
Deploy Memorial Day email campaign to initial list
Publish all social content promoting the Memorial Day bundle

channel_actions.pinterest: Publish 12 pins, with 5 focused on the Memorial Day theme.
channel_actions.reddit: Continue karma warmup. No links or brand mentions.
channel_actions.tiktok: Post 4 videos, including 2 related to the 'reset' theme of the promo.
channel_actions.instagram: Post 3 carousels, with 2 directly promoting the Memorial Day bundle.
channel_actions.email: Send 2 emails for the Memorial Day promo. Build abandoned cart flow.
channel_actions.shopify: Activate Memorial Day discount code. Monitor site for issues.
channel_actions.affiliate: Begin drafting personalized outreach DMs for reviewers.

must_ship: End Memorial Day promo on May 27
Launch Pride Box 2026 promo (20% off + 5% donation) on May 30
Deploy Pride Box email campaign

channel_actions.pinterest: Publish 12 pins, with 6 focused on Pride themes and colors.
channel_actions.reddit: Continue karma warmup. Engage in Pride-related subreddits authentically.
channel_actions.tiktok: Post 4 videos, transitioning from 'reset' to Pride celebration themes.
channel_actions.instagram: Post 3 carousels. Announce end of Memorial promo, then launch and promote Pride Box.
channel_actions.email: Send 'Last Chance' email for Memorial Day. Send 2 launch emails for Pride Box.
channel_actions.shopify: Deactivate Memorial Day code. Activate Pride Box code and donation tracking.
channel_actions.affiliate: Send initial outreach DMs to 5 targeted Reddit reviewers.

must_ship: End Pride Box promo on June 5
Launch Anniversary Luxury Set (20% off) on June 8
Complete 28-day Reddit karma warmup

channel_actions.pinterest: Publish 12 pins, transitioning from Pride to luxury/anniversary themes.
channel_actions.reddit: Final week of karma warmup. Prepare for first soft-mention posts next week.
channel_actions.tiktok: Post 5 videos, including behind-the-scenes of the Anniversary Set.
channel_actions.instagram: Post 3 carousels. 'Last chance' for Pride Box, then launch Anniversary Set.
channel_actions.email: Send 'Last Chance' email for Pride. Send 2 launch emails for Anniversary Set.
channel_actions.shopify: Deactivate Pride Box code. Activate Anniversary Set code.
channel_actions.affiliate: Follow up with any reviewers who have not responded.

must_ship: End Anniversary Luxury Set promo on June 14
Launch Father's Day Couples Gift Pack (20% off) on June 15
Create all assets for Father's Day campaign

channel_actions.pinterest: Post 10 pins with a focus on gifting, couples, and luxury.
channel_actions.reddit: Begin Phase 2. Make first brand-relevant, non-linking posts (e.g., asking for opinions on product types).
channel_actions.tiktok: Post 4 videos, focusing on the Anniversary Set and teasing the Father's Day pack.
channel_actions.instagram: Post 2 carousels. Promote Anniversary Set, then launch Father's Day pack.
channel_actions.email: Send 'Last Chance' for Anniversary. Send 2 launch emails for Father's Day.
channel_actions.shopify: Deactivate Anniversary code. Activate Father's Day code.
channel_actions.affiliate: Engage with reviewers who replied. Offer product for review.

must_ship: End Father's Day promo on June 21
Launch Travel Discreet Kit (20% off) on June 22
Analyze performance of first 4 campaigns

channel_actions.pinterest: Post 10 pins with a focus on travel, discretion, and portability.
channel_actions.reddit: Continue soft engagement. Share a link to a helpful blog post (not a product page) if organic to the conversation.
channel_actions.tiktok: Post 4 videos, focusing on the Father's Day pack and then launching the Travel Kit.
channel_actions.instagram: Post 3 carousels. 'Last chance' for Father's Day, then launch Travel Kit.
channel_actions.email: Send 'Last Chance' for Father's Day. Send 2 launch emails for Travel Kit.
channel_actions.shopify: Deactivate Father's Day code. Activate Travel Kit code.
channel_actions.affiliate: Ship products to reviewers who agreed to test.

must_ship: End Travel Discreet Kit promo on June 28
Compile 30-day performance report
Plan July content calendar based on winning themes

channel_actions.pinterest: Post 10 pins. Focus on evergreen educational content.
channel_actions.reddit: Engage in conversations where the Travel Kit is a relevant solution, potentially dropping a direct link for the first time.
channel_actions.tiktok: Post 4 videos. Focus on use-cases for the Travel Kit and evergreen brand content.
channel_actions.instagram: Post 2 carousels. 'Last chance' for Travel Kit, then switch to evergreen content.
channel_actions.email: Send 'Last Chance' for Travel Kit. Send a non-promotional, value-add newsletter.
channel_actions.shopify: Deactivate Travel Kit code. Optimize top-visited pages based on analytics.
channel_actions.affiliate: Check in with reviewers on shipping status and answer any questions.

must_ship: Publish one new pillar blog post on bdsmpub.com
Launch an Instagram Q&A or 'Ask Me Anything' session
Identify 3 top-performing organic posts to repurpose

channel_actions.pinterest: Post 10 pins linking to the new pillar blog post.
channel_actions.reddit: Create a high-value post summarizing learnings or a guide, subtly mentioning the brand.
channel_actions.tiktok: Post 4 videos, including one answering a community question.
channel_actions.instagram: Post 2 carousels. Promote the new blog post and host a Q&A in Stories.
channel_actions.email: Send newsletter promoting the new pillar content.
channel_actions.shopify: Add internal links from existing blogs to the new pillar page.
channel_actions.affiliate: Monitor for any reviews being posted. Prepare to engage and share.

must_ship: First affiliate review goes live
Launch a User-Generated Content (UGC) campaign with a clear hashtag
Create a dedicated highlight on Instagram for UGC

channel_actions.pinterest: Post 10 pins, including repinning affiliate content.
channel_actions.reddit: Share the affiliate review in a relevant subreddit with proper disclosure.
channel_actions.tiktok: Post 5 videos, launching the UGC campaign and showing examples.
channel_actions.instagram: Post 3 carousels. Announce UGC campaign and share the first affiliate review.
channel_actions.email: Email the list about the UGC campaign and share the affiliate review.
channel_actions.shopify: Add a UGC gallery section to relevant product pages.
channel_actions.affiliate: Amplify affiliate review across all channels. Pay out any agreed commission.

must_ship: A/B test welcome series email subject lines
Refresh top 10 Pinterest pins with new descriptions
Script and plan next batch of 30 TikToks based on performance data

channel_actions.pinterest: Refresh 10 old pins and publish 5 new ones.
channel_actions.reddit: Identify a new set of 3-5 subreddits for engagement.
channel_actions.tiktok: Post 4 videos. Experiment with one new format (e.g., duet, stitch).
channel_actions.instagram: Post 2 carousels. Repurpose a top-performing TikTok video as a Reel.
channel_actions.email: Analyze A/B test results from welcome flow. Plan next test for abandoned cart flow.
channel_actions.shopify: Review heatmaps on key pages and identify optimization opportunities.
channel_actions.affiliate: Identify 5 new potential affiliates to target for next outreach wave.

must_ship: Outline promotional calendar for August-October 2026
Develop concept for one major new product bundle
Survey email list for feedback and future product ideas

channel_actions.pinterest: Post 10 pins aligned with upcoming seasonal trends (e.g., back to school, fall).
channel_actions.reddit: Post a poll or question related to the new product bundle concept to gauge interest.
channel_actions.tiktok: Post 4 videos, subtly testing themes for the upcoming promotional calendar.
channel_actions.instagram: Post 2 carousels. Use Instagram Stories' poll/quiz features to gather audience feedback.
channel_actions.email: Send survey to the full email list with an incentive for completion.
channel_actions.shopify: Create draft product pages for the new bundle concept.
channel_actions.affiliate: Send a thank you and a small bonus product to initial affiliate partners.

must_ship: Complete 90-day performance analysis report
Finalize Q3/Q4 promotional calendar and budget
Identify top 2 acquisition channels to double-down on

channel_actions.pinterest: Post 10 pins. Archive bottom 10% performing pins.
channel_actions.reddit: Compile a 'Best Of' list of brand mentions and community feedback from the last 90 days.
channel_actions.tiktok: Post 4 videos, including a 'top 3 moments' or 'top 3 products' recap from the launch period.
channel_actions.instagram: Post 3 carousels, including a thank you to the community for the first 90 days.
channel_actions.email: Segment list based on engagement and purchase history. Send targeted campaigns.
channel_actions.shopify: Implement one major CRO improvement based on Week 10's heatmap analysis.
channel_actions.affiliate: Begin outreach to the second wave of 5 potential affiliates.

day_30_milestones: Successfully executed 2 major promotional campaigns (Memorial Day, Pride).
Completed 28-day Reddit karma warmup, account is ready for active marketing.
All foundational e-commerce pages and email flows are live and tested.
Established a consistent posting cadence on TikTok (3-5 posts/wk) and Instagram (2-3 posts/wk).
Secured initial engagement from at least 2 of 5 targeted affiliate reviewers.
Captured over 120 qualified emails via the on-site quiz.
day_90_milestones: Successfully executed and analyzed 5 promotional campaigns, identifying top-performing offers.
Generated first affiliate-driven sales from a published review.
Grown email list to over 350 subscribers with segmentation in place.
Launched a successful UGC campaign, generating at least 10 pieces of content.
Achieved a cumulative revenue of over $7,500 from targeted bundles.
Finalized a data-driven content and promotional plan for the following quarter.
critical_dependencies: Completion of MSDS documentation is required before any affiliate outreach can begin.
Deployment of Shopify pillar and bundle pages must happen in Week 1 to support all promotional campaigns.
Filming of the initial 30 TikToks must be completed by the end of Week 1 to maintain posting cadence.
Functionality of the Klaviyo quiz capture and welcome flow is critical for early list growth and must be live in Week 1.
